generateFirst.reason: Proves native 4K-class source, alpha/background, identity lock, and base silhouette.
Stress-tests mobile-safe hand gesture, finger quality, and safe frame width.
Stress-tests restrained ledger/keycard props, hand quality, and crop safety.

stopRules: Stop if any source long edge is below 4096px.
Stop if any full-body source short edge is below 2300px.
Stop if a source is visibly upscaled from low resolution.
Stop if true alpha is unavailable and the fallback background is not perfectly removable.
Stop if hands, feet, props, beard, glasses, coat hem, or shadow are cropped.
Stop if Otis becomes fake-perfect, literal Santa, mascot-like, photoreal, or generic hotel stock art.
Stop if the pose does not read at 96 CSS px.
afterProbePasses: Ingest the three source probes into the Otis run ledger.
Run source preflight and dark/light/lobby-warm QA previews.
Build a small probe review board for Armaan.
Only if probes pass, expand to the remaining regular poses, then summer-light, then winter-layered.
Do not promote or update public/art until final upload-ready board approval says exactly approved for app.
